subject: MANDATORY: E2E Testing Before Any Validation

content.summary: Validator escalated systemic Unit-E2E gap. This is now mandatory policy.
directive: NO task can be marked 'validated' based on unit tests alone
E2E testing is MANDATORY before sending to Validator
If E2E tests fail, the task is NOT COMPLETE - regardless of unit test results
Workers must provide actual E2E test output as evidence
Infrastructure issues blocking E2E = P0-CRITICAL - fix the infrastructure first
content.rationale: We've had multiple incidents where unit tests pass but actual functionality is broken. Unit tests verify code correctness; E2E tests verify the feature actually works. Both are required.
examples_of_failure: clawd-4io: Unit tests 'pass' but actual tests fail when run independently
clawd-r0y: Unit tests pass (62/62) but E2E shows rate limiting not working
clawd-zsk: Worker claimed fix applied but code didn't exist
action_required: Update validation checklists to require E2E evidence
Brief workers on this requirement before assigning new tasks
Reject any validation request without E2E test results
